query: SELECT item_key, name_ar, section, distribution_method, lump_sum_month, start_month, end_month FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE project_id = '4' AND scenario = 'offplan_escrow' AND section = 'offplan' ORDER BY sort_order;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT item_key, name_ar, section, distribution_method, lump_sum_month, start_month, end_month FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE project_id = '4' AND scenario = 'offplan_escrow' AND section = 'offplan' ORDER BY sort_order;
